title: Every Claude Code Concept Explained for Normal People
description:
🚀 Build agentic systems that run your business: https://skool.com/scrapes
Feeling lost in Claude Code? This ultimate guide is the shortcut you've been looking for. We break down 27 essential Claude Code concepts—from the absolute basics to game-changing power features—each explained for a non-technical audience. By the end of this video, you'll have the mental model to build confidently, automate tasks, and ship projects without the guesswork.

SECTION 1 - The Foundations (Concepts 1-8)
SECTION 2 - Making Claude Personal (Concepts 9-14)
SECTION 3 - Power Features (Concepts 15-23)
SECTION 4 - Using Claude Autonomously (Concepts 24-27)

05:29 - Tools (Read / Write / Bash)
06:22 - Context Window
07:20 - Conversation History / Resume

15:50 - Skills
